children.description: Main row content that is revealed/translated when the user swipes.

leftActions.description: Actions revealed when swiping right. Each: { key?, label, icon?, color?, onTrigger?, fullSwipe?, background?, ariaLabel? }.

threshold.description: Fraction of the actions strip width that must be swiped to open. Range 0-1.

fullSwipeThreshold.description: Fraction beyond which an action marked fullSwipe is auto-triggered without tapping.

variant.description: Visual style. 'card' adds rounded corners and a border; 'compact' uses tighter padding.

onSwipeOpen.description: Called when the row settles open on one side.

onSwipeClose.description: Called when the row returns to closed.

closeOnSelect.description: Auto-close after an action is tapped.

className.description: Additional CSS class for the wrapper.

actionWidth.description: Pixel width per revealed action button.
